A gentle nudge to keep your daily remembrance. Works in the installed app.

About & Support

Lulu began with a small, practical pocket book of dhikr my late father gave our family. Over the years, that little book became a treasured part of my daily life, eventually becoming so well-worn that I copied it by hand to preserve it. Inspired by my late mother’s constant reminders to keep remembrance in our everyday moments, and a love for the stars, I created Lulu to sustain my own practice. In a busy world where even the stars are fading from view, I hope this app serves as a quiet space to pause and reflect. May it bring light and benefit to your journey, just as it has to mine.

Spotted something that needs correcting, or have an idea to make Lulu better? I'd love to hear from you — write to salam@myluluapp.com anytime.

If it's been of benefit to you, a small chai is always appreciated.
